subject: Fix calculate button background color for better UI consistency
body:
Changed the calculate button from bright blue (bg-blue-600) to muted gray
(bg-gray-700) to better match the overall dark theme design. The button now
seamlessly integrates with the UI while remaining visually distinct through:
- Subtle shadow (shadow-lg)
- Gray border (border-gray-600)
- Hover state transition (bg-gray-600)

This change improves visual appeal by:
- Eliminating the jarring color contrast on mobile sticky positioning
- Reserving blue for selected states and focus indicators
- Creating a more cohesive, professional appearance
- Maintaining accessibility and prominence through elevation/shadow

Updated UI_UX_GUIDE.md to reflect the new styling patterns and added
changelog entry for version 2.1.
title: Fix calculate button background color for better UI consistency
